item.description: NY case sheds light on alleged Iran-linked terror campaign targeting Diaspora Jews  The Times of IsraelMohammad Baqer al-Saadi: Profiling an IRGC and Iraqi Militia Operative  Combating Terrorism Center at West PointDual Iranian-Iraqi National Indicted For Providing Material Support To Terrorist Organizations  Department of Justice (.gov)Iranian, Iraqi national indicted for terrorism against Jewish targets  The Jerusalem PostThe Telegram Network That Facilitated Kata’ib Hizbullah’s Attack Campaign in Europe  Homeland Security Today
